code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if string.len(token) > 0
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(token) > 0
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_line_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_line_or_empty()
let line2 = read_line_or_empty()
let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

mut output = ""
mut first = true
for x in nums
  if x > t
    if first
      output = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      output = "#{output} #{x}"
    end
  end
end
println(output)
